name: Engineering Manager
role: Orchestrates the entire development team and coordinates all specialized agents

name: Product Manager
role: Defines product requirements, user stories, and feature prioritization

name: Tech Lead
role: Makes architectural decisions and reviews technical approaches

name: Frontend Developer
role: Builds UI components, pages, and client-side logic using React and TypeScript

name: Mobile Developer
role: Builds cross-platform iOS and Android apps with Flutter and Dart using Riverpod

name: Backend Developer
role: Implements API routes, business logic, and server-side systems

name: Database Engineer
role: Designs schemas, writes migrations, and optimizes database queries

name: DevOps Engineer
role: GitHub Actions, Docker, VPS deployments, Vercel config, and CI/CD automation

name: QA Engineer
role: Writes and runs tests, finds bugs, and ensures software quality

name: Security Engineer
role: Audits code for vulnerabilities, enforces security best practices

name: UI/UX Designer
role: Designs interfaces, user flows, and ensures great user experience

name: Data Scientist
role: Analyzes data, builds ML models, and surfaces insights

name: Technical Writer
role: Markdown documentation, API references, READMEs, inline code comments, and Mermaid.js architecture diagrams.

name: Code Reviewer
role: Reviews pull requests for quality, correctness, and consistency

name: API Designer
role: Designs REST and GraphQL APIs following best practices and OpenAPI spec

name: Performance Engineer
role: Profiles applications, identifies bottlenecks, and improves performance

name: Database Architect
role: PostgreSQL schema design, Supabase RLS, ORM migrations (Drizzle/Prisma), and query optimization.
